content: TASK-055 checkpoint done: Prototype View now defaults to a ScreenFlow Map mode that shows screen image/fallback cards connected by arrowed transitions, with a Play mode for paper-prototype playback. Clicking a map card opens that screen in Play. Docs now describe Map vs Play. Verification: npm run typecheck; npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts test/render.test.ts; npm run build; browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ confirmed .archmap-prototype-flow=1, cards=8, arrows=8, and card click switches to Play. Next: refine visual layout of transition maps under denser screenflows, and keep QIF/spec drift checks before publication.
